global.description: The ad features a combination of geometric shapes and text promoting a cashback offer.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback rewards with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid color background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a clean and simple backdrop.

elements.label: Central graphic shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including a rectangle and a circle, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Earn cashback daily No hidden fees $4.99 Start now' prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily No hidden fees s4.99 Start now

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo 'CoinBridge' in a bold font, positioned at the top left of the ad, conveying brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, cashback offer, CoinBridge logo
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, central graphic shapes are in the middle, and the body text is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, No hidden fees, $4.99, Start now, CoinBridge
